catalog.name: idx_sync_dirty_rows_dirty_ordinal
catalog.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_sync_dirty_rows_dirty_ordinal ON _sync_dirty_rows(dirty_ordinal)

catalog.name: idx_users_name
catalog.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON users(name)

catalog.name: _sync_apply_state
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_apply_state (
  singleton_key INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY CHECK (singleton_key = 1),
  apply_mode INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
)

catalog.name: _sync_attachment_state
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_attachment_state (
  singleton_key INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY CHECK (singleton_key = 1),
  current_source_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  binding_state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'anonymous' CHECK (binding_state IN ('anonymous', 'attached')),
  attached_user_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  schema_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  last_bundle_seq_seen INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  rebuild_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pending_initialization_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
)

catalog.name: _sync_dirty_rows
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_dirty_rows (
  schema_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  table_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  key_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  op TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (op IN ('INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE')),
  base_row_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  payload TEXT,
  dirty_ordinal INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now')),
  PRIMARY KEY (schema_name, table_name, key_json)
)

catalog.name: _sync_managed_tables
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_managed_tables (
  schema_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  table_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (schema_name, table_name)
)

catalog.name: _sync_operation_state
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_operation_state (
  singleton_key INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY CHECK (singleton_key = 1),
  kind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none' CHECK (kind IN ('none', 'remote_replace', 'source_recovery')),
  target_user_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  staged_snapshot_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  snapshot_bundle_seq INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  snapshot_row_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  reason TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  replacement_source_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
)

catalog.name: _sync_outbox_bundle
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_outbox_bundle (
  singleton_key INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY CHECK (singleton_key = 1),
  canonical_json_contract TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (canonical_json_contract = 'jcs_uniform_numeric_strings_v1'),
  state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none' CHECK (state IN ('none', 'prepared', 'committed_remote')),
  source_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  source_bundle_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  initialization_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  canonical_request_hash TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  row_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  remote_bundle_hash TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  remote_bundle_seq INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
)

catalog.name: _sync_outbox_rows
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_outbox_rows (
  source_bundle_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  row_ordinal INTEGER NOT NULL,
  schema_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  table_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  key_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  wire_key_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  op TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (op IN ('INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE')),
  base_row_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  local_payload TEXT,
  wire_payload TEXT,
  PRIMARY KEY (source_bundle_id, row_ordinal)
)

catalog.name: _sync_row_state
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_row_state (
  schema_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  table_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  key_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  row_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  deleted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now')),
  PRIMARY KEY (schema_name, table_name, key_json)
)

catalog.name: _sync_snapshot_stage
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_snapshot_stage (
  snapshot_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  row_ordinal INTEGER NOT NULL,
  schema_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  table_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  key_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  row_version INTEGER NOT NULL,
  payload TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (snapshot_id, row_ordinal)
)

catalog.name: _sync_source_state
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE _sync_source_state (
  source_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  next_source_bundle_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  replaced_by_source_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'))
)

catalog.name: users
catalog.sql:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT
)

catalog.name: trg_users_ad
catalog.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_ad AFTER DELETE ON "users" WHEN COALESCE((SELECT apply_mode FROM _sync_apply_state WHERE singleton_key = 1), 0) = 0 BEGIN INSERT INTO _sync_dirty_rows(schema_name, table_name, key_json, op, base_row_version, payload, dirty_ordinal, updated_at) VALUES ( 'main', 'users', json_object('id', OLD."id"), 'DELETE', COALESCE( (SELECT base_row_version FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', OLD."id")), (SELECT row_version FROM _sync_row_state WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', OLD."id")), 0 ), NULL, COALESCE( (SELECT dirty_ordinal FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', OLD."id")), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(dirty_ordinal), 0) + 1 FROM _sync_dirty_rows) ), strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now') ) ON CONFLICT(schema_name, table_name, key_json) DO UPDATE SET op='DELETE', payload=NULL, updated_at=excluded.updated_at; END

catalog.name: trg_users_ai
catalog.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_ai AFTER INSERT ON "users" WHEN COALESCE((SELECT apply_mode FROM _sync_apply_state WHERE singleton_key = 1), 0) = 0 BEGIN INSERT INTO _sync_dirty_rows(schema_name, table_name, key_json, op, base_row_version, payload, dirty_ordinal, updated_at) VALUES ( 'main', 'users', json_object('id', NEW."id"), CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_row_state WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id") AND deleted=0 ) THEN 'UPDATE' ELSE 'INSERT' END, COALESCE( (SELECT base_row_version FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id")), (SELECT row_version FROM _sync_row_state WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id")), 0 ), json_object('id', NEW."id", 'name', NEW."name", 'updated_at', NEW."updated_at"), COALESCE( (SELECT dirty_ordinal FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id")), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(dirty_ordinal), 0) + 1 FROM _sync_dirty_rows) ), strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now') ) ON CONFLICT(schema_name, table_name, key_json) DO UPDATE SET op=excluded.op, payload=excluded.payload, updated_at=excluded.updated_at; END

catalog.name: trg_users_au
catalog.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_au AFTER UPDATE ON "users" WHEN COALESCE((SELECT apply_mode FROM _sync_apply_state WHERE singleton_key = 1), 0) = 0 BEGIN INSERT INTO _sync_dirty_rows(schema_name, table_name, key_json, op, base_row_version, payload, dirty_ordinal, updated_at) SELECT 'main', 'users', json_object('id', OLD."id"), 'DELETE', COALESCE( (SELECT base_row_version FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', OLD."id")), (SELECT row_version FROM _sync_row_state WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', OLD."id")), 0 ), NULL, COALESCE( (SELECT dirty_ordinal FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', OLD."id")), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(dirty_ordinal), 0) + 1 FROM _sync_dirty_rows) ), strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now') WHERE json_object('id', OLD."id") != json_object('id', NEW."id") ON CONFLICT(schema_name, table_name, key_json) DO UPDATE SET op='DELETE', payload=NULL, updated_at=excluded.updated_at; INSERT INTO _sync_dirty_rows(schema_name, table_name, key_json, op, base_row_version, payload, dirty_ordinal, updated_at) VALUES ( 'main', 'users', json_object('id', NEW."id"), CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_row_state WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id") AND deleted=0 ) THEN 'UPDATE' ELSE 'INSERT' END, COALESCE( (SELECT base_row_version FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id")), (SELECT row_version FROM _sync_row_state WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id")), 0 ), json_object('id', NEW."id", 'name', NEW."name", 'updated_at', NEW."updated_at"), COALESCE( (SELECT dirty_ordinal FROM _sync_dirty_rows WHERE schema_name='main' AND table_name='users' AND key_json=json_object('id', NEW."id")), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(dirty_ordinal), 0) + 1 FROM _sync_dirty_rows) ), strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now') ) ON CONFLICT(schema_name, table_name, key_json) DO UPDATE SET op=excluded.op, payload=excluded.payload, updated_at=excluded.updated_at; END

catalog.name: trg_users_bd_guard
catalog.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_bd_guard BEFORE DELETE ON "users" WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_operation_state WHERE singleton_key = 1 AND kind != 'none' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_apply_state WHERE singleton_key = 1 AND apply_mode = 1 ) BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'SYNC_TRANSITION_PENDING'); END

catalog.name: trg_users_bi_guard
catalog.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_bi_guard BEFORE INSERT ON "users" WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_operation_state WHERE singleton_key = 1 AND kind != 'none' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_apply_state WHERE singleton_key = 1 AND apply_mode = 1 ) BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'SYNC_TRANSITION_PENDING'); END

catalog.name: trg_users_bu_guard
catalog.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_bu_guard BEFORE UPDATE ON "users" WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_operation_state WHERE singleton_key = 1 AND kind != 'none' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM _sync_apply_state WHERE singleton_key = 1 AND apply_mode = 1 ) BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'SYNC_TRANSITION_PENDING'); END

catalog.name: active_users
catalog.sql:
CREATE VIEW active_users AS
SELECT id, name
FROM users
WHERE name <> ''

views.name: active_users
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW active_users AS
SELECT id, name
FROM users
WHERE name <> ''

triggers.name: trg_users_bd_guard
